name: re-engagement
description: 3-email sequence for cold subscribers who haven't opened in 30+ days
goal: Re-activate dormant subscribers or clean list

emails.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

I noticed you haven't opened my emails in a while.

That's totally fine - inboxes are overwhelming.

But before I let you go, I wanted to check:

**Are you still interested in AI automation?**

If YES → Hit reply and say "YES" (I'll keep you on the list)

If NO → No hard feelings. [Click here to unsubscribe]({{unsubscribe_link}})

If MAYBE → Let me know what you'd actually want to read about:
- [ ] Content automation
- [ ] Email marketing
- [ ] Lead generation
- [ ] Revenue automation
- [ ] Case studies
- [ ] Step-by-step tutorials

Reply with your picks, and I'll tailor future emails to YOU.

**Why I'm Doing This:**

I'd rather have 100 engaged readers than 10,000 ghost subscribers.

If you're not getting value, I want to know. So I can fix it or let you go.

Let me know,
n0mad

P.S. If I don't hear from you, I'll assume you're not interested and remove you from the list. No spam, no BS.

emails.subject_A: 🎁 Last Chance: Here's Something You'll Actually Want
emails.body:
{{first_name}},

Still haven't heard from you. That's okay.

Before you go, I want to give you something valuable:

**The Complete AI Automation Playbook (Free)**

- 20+ Automation Blueprints
- Copy-paste templates
- Tool recommendations (free + paid)
- Case studies with real results

**No strings attached.** Just a thank-you for being a subscriber.

[Download the Playbook]({{playbook_link}})

**And if you're done with these emails?**

[Unsubscribe here]({{unsubscribe_link}}). No hard feelings.

Either way, I hope this helps you build something great.

n0mad

P.S. This is the last email you'll get from me unless you download the playbook or reply.

{{first_name}},

This is it.

I'm removing you from the email list after this.

**Why?**

You haven't opened an email in over 30 days. That tells me you're either:
- Not interested anymore
- Too busy
- Found what you needed elsewhere

And that's totally fine.

**But if I'm wrong...**

If you DO want to stay, [click here to confirm]({{resubscribe_link}}).

You'll get:
- Weekly automation tutorials
- Case studies & real results
- Exclusive tips & tools
- First access to new products

**If you don't click, you're automatically unsubscribed in 24 hours.**

No more emails. No more notifications. Clean slate.

**Your call.**

[Stay Subscribed]({{resubscribe_link}}) | [Unsubscribe]({{unsubscribe_link}})

Thanks for being here (even if it's just been for a while),
n0mad

P.S. If you want back in later, you can always re-subscribe at {{website_link}}. But you'll lose your subscriber perks and start from scratch.
